title: A woman from Paranaguá-PR reported two UFO sightings within a month [1993]

text_preview: APRIL 4th, 1993. 00:27 am. Duration: First sighting: 15 minutes. Second sighting: 5 minutes. A woman from Paranaguá, State of Paraná, reported two sightings of two unidentified flying objects that occurred within a month in her region. According to the witness, she was with her family when they observed two UFOs in the form of stars, however much smaller, with varied colors that changed from red and green, to white and blue. The UFOs moved slowly “at the height of airplanes”. The first sighting took place in March 1993 near the western sector of Curitiba. The second sighting occurred in the so
summary: A Paranaguá woman and her family reported two star-like multicolor UFOs spinning on their axes in Curitiba's western and southeastern sectors in March–April 1993.
